default_environment.description: Default workspace or folder environment to select when lazytf starts.

compression_threshold.description: Compress stored output larger than this many bytes.

level.description: History detail level. Supported values are minimal, standard, and full.

path.description: Path to the history database file.

mouse.description: Enable mouse navigation in the UI. By default lazytf enables mouse outside tmux and disables it inside tmux to respect tmux mouse settings. Set this explicitly to override that behavior.

notification.description: Enable user notifications for important UI events. Set this explicitly to override the default behavior.

presets.description: Named presets that bundle environment selection, workdir, theme, and default Terraform flags.

environment.description: Workspace or folder environment selected when this preset is used.

flags.description: Additional Terraform flags appended when this preset is selected.

theme.description: Built-in UI theme to apply when this preset is selected.

workdir.description: Working directory to use when this preset is selected.

flags.description: Additional Terraform flags for this project.

preset_name.description: Preset name to apply for this project before project-specific overrides.

theme.description: Built-in UI theme override for this project.

project_overrides.description: Per-project overrides keyed by project path.

terraform.description: Terraform execution settings used by lazytf.

binary.description: Path to the Terraform binary to run.

default_flags.description: Default flags appended to Terraform commands run by lazytf.

parallelism.description: Default Terraform parallelism value used when no explicit -parallelism flag is provided.

timeout.description: Maximum time allowed for Terraform commands before lazytf cancels them.

working_dir.description: Default working directory used when no folder or preset overrides it.

theme.description: Theme settings for the lazytf UI.

warnings.description: Controls warning visibility in the UI and runtime diagnostics.

suppress_all.description: Suppress all non-blocking warnings shown by lazytf.

suppress_schema_hint_mismatch.description: Suppress warnings when the config file schema hint does not match the running lazytf version.
